comments.author: @AmazingDiscoveriesTopUS
comments.text: Norway struck oil and built one of the world's richest societies. Was it luck... or did smart leadership make all the difference?

replies.author: @Outland_US
replies.text: Luck provided the oil, but leadership secured the future. By investing revenues into a massive sovereign wealth fund, Norway created successful national retirement planning. Do you think other nations could replicate this discipline with sudden wealth?
